Applet.title: Applet
Applet.description: Represents an applet configuration managed within the dashboard.

description.description: Short description of the applet functionality

url.description: Remote URL or local OMV hosted URL to render inside iframe

embedCode.description: Custom HTML/CSS/JS source to embed directly

icon.description: Lucide icon key name or emoji for visual identification

category.description: Category for layout grouping (e.g., Productivity, System, Entertainment)

openMode.description: Whether to load the app inside the cockpit iframe or spawn a new browser tab

accentColor.description: A tailwind-accent class or hex color code for card borders

isPinned.description: Whether the applet is pinned to the dashboard favorites

ownerId.description: The creator UID for multi-device sync authorization

/applets/{appletId}.description: Cloud collection containing user-defined applets synced across their dashboard nodes.
